description:
OpenTTD is an open-source transport simulation game.
Build transport networks using trains, road vehicles, aircraft, and ships.
All vehicles and cargo types must be unlocked through Archipelago checks!

0.1.0.description:
## OpenTTD Cargolock 0.1.0

First public release of the OpenTTD Cargolock apworld

### Features
- Cargo-lock progression (cargo must be unlocked before transport)
- Progressive unlocks for trains, road vehicles, aircraft, and ships
- Static mission location set
- Optional AP shop with configurable slots/tiers/cost range
- Multiplayer support (co-op single AP slot and multi-company/AP slot )
- Universal Tracker yaml-less compatibility
- Archipelago minimum version: 0.6.6

0.1.1.description:
## OpenTTD Cargolock 0.1.1

Shop window fix, progressive aircraft not giving airports fix
